description: Create a mechanical base plate drawing in LibreCAD. The drawing must include a 'PLATE' layer (Color: White/7) containing a rectangle from (0,0) to (300,250) and a 'SLOTS' layer (Color: Cyan/4) containing four horizontal obround slots. Each slot consists of two semicircles (Radius 7mm) connected by horizontal lines, with an overall length of 84mm and a center-to-center distance of 70mm. Position the slots using the following center points for the arcs: Slot 1 at (50, 50) and (120, 50); Slot 2 at (50, 200) and (120, 200); Slot 3 at (180, 50) and (250, 50); and Slot 4 at (180, 200) and (250, 200). Save the drawing as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/motor_base_plate.dxf.
